tasks.subject: Task 1: reviewer + refuter prompts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the two shared prompt files that both models use, emitting strict JSON.

**Files:**
- Create: `superlazy-cc/agents/superlazy-review-critic.md`
- Create: `superlazy-cc/agents/superlazy-refute-critic.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- codex-critic.sh review returns parseable {verdict,summary,findings}
- codex-critic.sh refute returns {refuted,reason}
- both files register as subagent types (valid frontmatter)

**Verify:** cd /Users/sultan/Development/lazypowers && printf 'WORKTREE: %s\nBASE_SHA: HEAD~1\nHEAD_SHA: HEAD\nDIMENSIONS: correctness\nCONTEXT:\n(none)\n' "$(pwd)" | ./superlazy-cc/scripts/codex-critic.sh review | node -e 'JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"))'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["superlazy-cc/agents/superlazy-review-critic.md","superlazy-cc/agents/superlazy-refute-critic.md"], "verifyCommand": "codex-critic.sh review returns parseable JSON", "acceptanceCriteria": ["review returns {verdict,summary,findings}","refute returns {refuted,reason}","frontmatter registers subagent types"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: synthesis lib + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure node module with all deterministic logic (bucket/rank/refute-filter/render) + CLI, unit-tested, no model calls.

**Files:**
- Create: `superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/lib/review-synth.mjs`
- Create: `superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/lib/review-synth.test.mjs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- bucketFindings agreement/single + stable ids
- rankFindings severity>agreement>dimension
- applyRefutations drops refuted singles keeps agreed
- renderReport markdown shape
- node --test passes

**Verify:** node --test /Users/sultan/Development/lazypowers/superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/lib/review-synth.test.mjs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/lib/review-synth.mjs","superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/lib/review-synth.test.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "node --test /Users/sultan/Development/lazypowers/superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/lib/review-synth.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bucket agreement/single + ids","rank order","refute filter","render markdown","node --test passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SKILL.md coordinator pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Coordinator instructions running the full pipeline, wiring Task 1 prompts + Task 2 lib.

**Files:**
- Create: `superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- parses local/PR/flags
- parallel Claude (Agent superlazy-review-critic) + Codex (codex-critic.sh review)
- bucket -> refute singles -> render
- codex-down/empty-diff/no-base handling; --post confirm; worktree cleanup
- references only existing files/agents

**Verify:** for a in 'subagent_type: superlazy-review-critic' 'codex-critic.sh' 'review-synth.mjs bucket' 'superlazy-refute-critic' '--post' 'worktree remove'; do grep -q "$a" /Users/sultan/Development/lazypowers/superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/SKILL.md || echo MISSING $a; done

```json:metadata
{"files": ["superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep the SKILL.md for the required wiring tokens", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parses local/PR/flags","parallel reviews","bucket->refute->render","error handling + --post confirm + cleanup","references existing files"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: plugin.json version bump
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump plugin version + note the new skill.

**Files:**
- Modify: `superlazy-cc/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- version 1.4.0
- description mentions superlazy-review
- valid JSON

**Verify:** node -e 'const p=require("/Users/sultan/Development/lazypowers/superlazy-cc/.claude-plugin/plugin.json"); if(p.version!=="1.4.0")throw 0; console.log("ok")'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["superlazy-cc/.claude-plugin/plugin.json"], "verifyCommand": "node -e require plugin.json; assert version 1.4.0", "acceptanceCriteria": ["version 1.4.0","description mentions superlazy-review","valid JSON"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: golden fixture + acceptance + README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Golden fixture (planted Critical + plausible-false), acceptance doc, README section.

**Files:**
- Create: `superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/test/fixture.diff`
- Create: `superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/test/acceptance.md`
- Modify: `README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- fixture has planted Critical + plausible-but-false line
- acceptance.md documents apply->run->expected (Critical survives, false refuted)
- node --test on synth lib is the automated gate; live run is manual acceptance
- README documents install + usage

**Verify:** node --test /Users/sultan/Development/lazypowers/superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/lib/review-synth.test.mjs && test -f /Users/sultan/Development/lazypowers/superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/test/acceptance.md && grep -q superlazy-review /Users/sultan/Development/lazypowers/README.md && echo ok

```json:metadata
{"files": ["superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/test/fixture.diff","superlazy-cc/skills/superlazy-review/test/acceptance.md","README.md"], "verifyCommand": "node --test synth + acceptance.md exists + README mentions superlazy-review", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fixture planted Critical + false","acceptance doc","node --test gate","README usage"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
